<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="jhPcKYqqQ6V_vIeDBu7-" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-539" dy="-198" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="AI Agent Harness Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="950" x="40" y="8" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="User / External Input" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="38" width="130" x="450" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="harness-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf4fb;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=3;arcSize=4;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="618" width="950" x="40" y="98" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="harness-lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a4e79;" value="Agent Harness (Runtime Environment)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="360" x="56" y="102" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="orch-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=5;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="128" width="894" x="68" y="136" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="orch-lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a5c1a;" value="Orchestration Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="220" x="82" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="planner" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f9dbc8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Task Planner" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="155" x="88" y="176" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="router" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f9dbc8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Agent Router" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="155" x="284" y="176" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lifecycle" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f9dbc8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Lifecycle Manager" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="155" x="480" y="176" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hil" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f9dbc8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Human-in-the-Loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="162" x="690" y="176" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ctx-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=5;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="158" width="440" x="68" y="286" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ctx-lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#5b0ea6;" value="Context Engine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="180" x="82" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ctxwin" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" value="Context Window Manager" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="168" x="86" y="324" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="compress" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" value="Compression & Compaction" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="168" x="298" y="324" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ctxnotes" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" value="State Injection / RAG Retrieval" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="400" x="86" y="388" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mem-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=5;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="158" width="392" x="540" y="286" (Context Window)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="108" x="558" y="324" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;" value="Session State
(Persistent Logs)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="108" x="682" y="324" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ltm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;" value="Long-Term Memory
(Vector / KV Store)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="110" x="806" y="324" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="memnotes" parent="1"
